## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that squad-kit makes hard today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A new command, prompt edit, config option, agent target, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds, other tools, prior art. -->

## Scope check

squad-kit intentionally stays small. Before suggesting, please consider:

- [ ] Could this be an edit to a shipped prompt template instead of new CLI surface?
- [ ] Does it avoid adding runtime dependencies?
- [ ] Does it keep the per-implementation-turn context cost flat or lower?
